description: Sensors in a grain bin report a rise in temperature and CO2 levels, indicating potential spoilage.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the grain condition alert and retrieve the temperature and CO2 data from the sensors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms a 'hot spot' is developing in the grain bin.

nodes.task_description: Automatically activate the aeration fans in the grain bin to cool the grain and reduce the temperature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully turns on the aeration system.

nodes.task_description: Notify the farm manager of the issue and the action taken, and advise them to continue monitoring the situation closely.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a clear and informative alert.
